title: calea fruticosa
intro: Calea fruticosa, also known as Mexican Damiana or Calea, is a shrub-like plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calea fruticosa include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost libido and improve overall well-being. Calea fruticosa is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
